theme: Cognitive Reflection and Recognition of Political Bias
description: Participants reflected on how the presented data challenged or confirmed their existing mental models of the out-party, often leading to a recognition of personal bias and learning.

many results i didnt expect

interesting to see how consistent some views are over time and across different issues.
to make you think is a lot better than not.

theme: Skepticism of Data Veracity and Methodology
description: This theme captures participant doubts regarding the legitimacy of the data shown, the timeliness of sources, and requests for more granular demographic information or transparency.
codes: Concerns about data veracity and verification
Interest in data demographics and provenance
